requirements.title: Map Initialization
requirements.description: The map module shall initialize from a caller-provided backing array.
requirements.rationale: A hash map provides O(1) average-case key-value lookup, which is essential for configuration registries, symbol tables, and message routing in embedded systems; initializing from a caller-provided array satisfies the zero-allocation constraint.

requirements.title: Map Hash Function Injection
requirements.description: The map module shall accept an injected hashable pointer API with Hash and IsValueNull operations.
requirements.rationale: Injecting the hash function decouples the map from a specific hash algorithm, allowing integrators to choose an algorithm suited to their key type and collision characteristics.

requirements.title: Map Equality Injection
requirements.description: The map module shall accept an injected value pointer API with an Equals operation for key comparison.
requirements.rationale: Injecting the equality operation decouples the map from a specific key type, allowing arbitrary key comparisons without hard-coded logic.

requirements.title: Map Set
requirements.description: The map shall insert or update a key-value pair using linear probing.
requirements.rationale: Linear probing provides a simple, cache-friendly collision resolution strategy that works within the fixed-size backing array without dynamic bucket chains.

requirements.title: Map Table Full Rejection
requirements.description: The map shall return JUNO_STATUS_TABLE_FULL_ERROR when no empty slot exists during a Set operation.
requirements.rationale: Explicit rejection on a full table surfaces the capacity limit to the caller rather than silently overwriting existing entries or entering an infinite probe loop.

requirements.title: Map Get
requirements.description: The map shall retrieve an entry by key using linear probing.
requirements.rationale: Get is the primary read operation; using the same linear probing strategy as Set ensures consistent key lookup behavior.

requirements.title: Map Key Not Found
requirements.description: The map shall return JUNO_STATUS_DNE_ERROR when a Get operation does not find the key.
requirements.rationale: Returning a distinct not-found status enables the caller to distinguish between a missing key and a key with a zero/null value.

requirements.title: Map Remove
requirements.description: The map shall remove an entry by key using linear probing, resetting the slot.
requirements.rationale: Remove with slot reset ensures that freed slots are returned to the null state expected by the probing algorithm, maintaining map integrity.

requirements.title: Map Vtable Validation
requirements.description: The map module shall verify that its API vtable entries are non-null before each operation.
requirements.rationale: Validates the vtable at runtime to ensure memory safety before dispatching any map operation through function pointers.

requirements.title: Map Dependency Validation
requirements.description: The map module shall verify that the backing array, hashable pointer API, and value pointer API dependencies are valid before each operation.
requirements.rationale: Validates all injected dependencies at runtime to catch misconfigured or partially initialized map instances before they produce undefined behavior.
